property.name: test01_addVehicle_success
property.value: test VehicleService Add Vehicle Returns Saved Vehicle

property.name: test02_addVehicle_duplicateThrows
property.value: test VehicleService Add Vehicle Duplicate Number Throws DuplicateResourceException

property.name: test03_getAllVehicles_returnsList
property.value: test VehicleService Get All Vehicles Returns List

property.name: test04_getVehicleById_found
property.value: test VehicleService Get Vehicle By ID Returns Correct Vehicle

property.name: test05_getVehicleById_notFound
property.value: test VehicleService Get Vehicle By ID Not Found Throws ResourceNotFoundException

property.name: test06_updateVehicle_success
property.value: test VehicleService Update Vehicle Returns Updated Vehicle

property.name: test07_deleteVehicle_success
property.value: test VehicleService Delete Vehicle Removes Record

property.name: test08_deleteVehicle_notFound
property.value: test VehicleService Delete Vehicle Not Found Throws ResourceNotFoundException

property.name: test09_searchVehicleByNumber
property.value: test VehicleService Search Vehicle By Number Returns Correct Vehicle

property.name: test10_searchVehicleByBrand
property.value: test VehicleService Search Vehicle By Brand Returns List

property.name: test11_filterVehicleByStatus
property.value: test VehicleService Filter Vehicle By Status Returns Filtered List

property.name: test12_sortVehicleByYearAsc
property.value: test VehicleService Sort Vehicles By Manufacturing Year Ascending

property.name: test13_sortVehicleByYearDesc
property.value: test VehicleService Sort Vehicles By Manufacturing Year Descending

property.name: test14_sortVehicleByMileageAsc
property.value: test VehicleService Sort Vehicles By Mileage Ascending

property.name: test15_assignDriverToVehicle
property.value: test VehicleService Assign Driver To Vehicle Updates Driver

property.name: test16_addDriver_success
property.value: test DriverService Add Driver Returns Saved Driver

property.name: test17_addDriver_duplicateLicenseThrows
property.value: test DriverService Add Driver Duplicate License Throws DuplicateResourceException

property.name: test18_getAllDrivers_returnsList
property.value: test DriverService Get All Drivers Returns List

property.name: test19_getDriverById_found
property.value: test DriverService Get Driver By ID Returns Correct Driver

property.name: test20_getDriverById_notFound
property.value: test DriverService Get Driver By ID Not Found Throws ResourceNotFoundException

property.name: test21_updateDriver_success
property.value: test DriverService Update Driver Returns Updated Driver

property.name: test22_deleteDriver_success
property.value: test DriverService Delete Driver Removes Record

property.name: test23_deleteDriver_notFound
property.value: test DriverService Delete Driver Not Found Throws ResourceNotFoundException

property.name: test24_searchDriverByName
property.value: test DriverService Search Driver By Name Returns List

property.name: test25_filterDriverByAvailability
property.value: test DriverService Filter Driver By Availability Returns Filtered List

property.name: test26_sortDriverByExperienceAsc
property.value: test DriverService Sort Drivers By Experience Ascending

property.name: test27_sortDriverByExperienceDesc
property.value: test DriverService Sort Drivers By Experience Descending

property.name: test28_addDriver_verifyPhoneNumber
property.value: test DriverService Add Driver Verify Phone Number Is Saved Correctly

property.name: test29_addDriver_verifyExperience
property.value: test DriverService Add Driver Verify Experience Years Is Saved Correctly

property.name: test30_addDriver_verifyAvailabilityStatus
property.value: test DriverService Add Driver Verify Availability Status Is Available

property.name: test31_addMaintenanceRecord_success
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Add Maintenance Record Returns Saved Record

property.name: test32_addMaintenance_vehicleNotFound
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Add Maintenance Vehicle Not Found Throws ResourceNotFoundException

property.name: test33_getAllMaintenanceRecords
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Get All Maintenance Records Returns List

property.name: test34_getMaintenanceById_found
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Get Maintenance By ID Returns Correct Record

property.name: test35_getMaintenanceById_notFound
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Get Maintenance By ID Not Found Throws ResourceNotFoundException

property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Update Maintenance Record Returns Updated Record

property.name: test37_deleteMaintenanceRecord
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Delete Maintenance Record Removes Record

property.name: test38_deleteMaintenanceRecord_notFound
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Delete Maintenance Record Not Found Throws ResourceNotFoundException

property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Search Maintenance By Service Type Returns List

property.name: test40_filterMaintenanceByDate
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Filter Maintenance By Service Date Returns List

property.name: test41_sortMaintenanceByCostAsc
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Sort Maintenance By Service Cost Ascending

property.name: test42_sortMaintenanceByCostDesc
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Sort Maintenance By Service Cost Descending

property.name: test43_getMaintenanceByVehicle
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Get Maintenance Records By Vehicle Returns List

property.name: test44_maintenanceRecord_verifyServiceCenter
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Add Maintenance Verify Service Center Is Saved Correctly

property.name: test45_maintenanceRecord_verifyServiceCost
property.value: test MaintenanceRecordService Add Maintenance Verify Service Cost Is Saved Correctly

property.name: test46_addInsurance_success
property.value: test InsuranceService Add Insurance Returns Saved Insurance

property.value: test InsuranceService Add Insurance Duplicate Policy Number Throws DuplicateResourceException

property.value: test InsuranceService Add Insurance Vehicle Not Found Throws ResourceNotFoundException

property.value: test InsuranceService Get All Insurance Returns List

property.value: test InsuranceService Delete Insurance Not Found Throws ResourceNotFoundException

property.value: test InsuranceService Filter Insurance By Coverage Type Returns Filtered List

property.name: test57_sortInsuranceByPremiumAsc
property.value: test InsuranceService Sort Insurance By Premium Amount Ascending

property.name: test58_sortInsuranceByPremiumDesc
property.value: test InsuranceService Sort Insurance By Premium Amount Descending

property.value: test InsuranceService Add Insurance Verify Premium Amount Is Saved Correctly

property.name: test60_insurance_verifyVehicleNumber
property.value: test InsuranceService Add Insurance Verify Vehicle Number Is Linked Correctly
